text:
Once upon a time in a small seaside village, there lived a dog named Buster who couldn't stop talking about his dream vacation to Hawaii. Every evening after dinner, Buster would gather the entire village around his tiny cardboard box home to regale us with tales of beaches lined with lemonade bars, majestic rainbow lorises and exotic birds whose calls could sing your socks off.

One day, Buster stumbled upon an antique map marked with an ancient golden relic. It claimed to transport whoever dared to treasure it to Hawaii... every day!

Buster was overjoyed. Every evening he'd leap onto his owner's shoulder, hop gleefully across the mouseboard floor, and read aloud from leaflets about tropical birds hummingbird feeders. Our dear canine companion lived happily ever after, sailing away whenever the call of a hummingbird chased a flowerdish flea sounded in the petunia garden.

Oh, every day did wonders for Buster's dream vacations! And whenever he thought about them, the sunlit Hawaiian
